sqlMap.select: SELECT DEFAULTVIEW, STARTDAY, STARTTIME, ENDTIME, AUTODELETE, REMINDERTIME, DEFAULTVIEWCHECK FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT DISTINCT A.GROUPID AS GROUPID, GROUPNAME, '' AS DESCRIPTION, '' AS CREATEDATE, A.GROUPCOLOR AS GROUPCOLOR, CREATORID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP A LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER B ON A.GROUPID = B.GROUPID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE (CREATORID = #v_USERID# OR ( MEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND STATUS = 1 )) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ORDER BY GROUPNAME

SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, (A.CREATEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS CREATEDATE, A.CREATORID, A.CREATORNAME, A.CREATORNAME2, A.CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, (A.MODIFYDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, (A.STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS STARTDATE, (A.ENDDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, B.GROUPNAME, A.COMPANYID, B.GROUPCOLOR, SHOWTOP FROM TBL_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP B ON A.OWNERID = B.GROUPID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT C.* FROM ( SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, A.CREATORID, A.CREATORNAME, A.CREATORNAME2, (A.CREATEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS CREATEDATE, A.MODIFIERID, A.MODIFIERNAME, A.MODIFIERNAME2, (A.MODIFYDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, (A.STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS STARTDATE, (A.ENDDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, B.GROUPNAME, A.COMPANYID, CASE WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 1 THEN 'rgb(1, 138, 249)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 2 THEN 'rgb(1, 179, 63)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 3 THEN 'rgb(254, 28, 113)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 7 THEN B.GROUPCOLOR WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 10 THEN 'rgb(255, 174, 0)' ELSE 'rgb(233, 222, 19)' END AS GROUPCOLOR, SHOWTOP FROM TBL_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP B ON A.OWNERID = B.GROUPID WHERE (A.OWNERID IN
#v_INDILIST[]#
AND a.scheduletype <> '10' AND ( (A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.DATETYPE='3') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
AND a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
AND location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
AND ( a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') ESCAPE '\' OR location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') ESCAPE '\' )
AND a.ispublic = 'Y'
) or (A.OWNERID IN
#v_PIDLIST[]#
and A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and ((A.scheduletype = '2' and A.ownerid in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# UNION ALL SELECT UNISTR(DEPARTMENTCN) FROM tbl_schedule_public_dept WHERE USERCN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )) or (A.scheduletype <> '2')) AND ( (A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.DATETYPE='3') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
AND location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
AND ( a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') ESCAPE '\' OR location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') ESCAPE '\' )
AND a.ispublic = 'Y'
) OR (a.scheduletype = '10' AND a.ownerid IN (
SELECT cn FROM tbl_executive WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT USERID FROM tbl_secretary WHERE (SECRETARYID = #v_USERID# or USERID = #v_USERID#) AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
)
AND ( (A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.DATETYPE='3') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
AND a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
AND location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
AND ( a.title like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') ESCAPE '\' OR location like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') ESCAPE '\' )
AND a.ispublic = 'Y'
) ) C ORDER BY C.STARTDATE ASC
SELECT GROUPID, GROUPNAME, DESCRIPTION, CREATEDATE, GROUPCOLOR FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP WHERE CREATORID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ORDER BY GROUPNAME

SELECT COUNT(U.MEMBERID) FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, NVL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT AA.DEPARTMENT FROM ( SELECT A.DEPARTMENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ( SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D UNION ALL SELECT B.CN, A.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID ) A WHERE A.CN = #v_USERID# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AA WHERE AA.CNT = '1'

SELECT U.MEMBERID, U.DISPLAYNAME MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 MEMBERNAME2, U.MAIL, '' AS STATUS, '' RESPONSEDATE, U.DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME || '(' || D.DISPLAYNAME || ')' WHEN '2' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME2 || '(' || D.DISPLAYNAME2 || ')' END INFO FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, NVL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT U.MEMBERID, G.GROUPNAME, G.DESCRIPTION, U.DISPLAYNAME AS MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 AS MEMBERNAME2, U.STATUS AS STATUS, (U.RESPONSEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS RESPONSEDATE, U.MAIL AS MAIL, U.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, '' AS INFO, U.WRITEPERMISSION FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, NVL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.RESPONSEDATE, A.STATUS, A.WRITEPERMISSION, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID WHERE U.groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND U.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION WHEN '2' THEN DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE
DEPARTMENT IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%'||#v_DEPTID#||'%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND cn not in ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , case #v_LANG# when '1' then A.displayname when '2' then A.displayname2 end displayname, A.displayname2, case #v_LANG# when '1' then C.DISPLAYNAME when '2' then C.DISPLAYNAME2 end description, C.DISPLAYNAME2, A.title , A.title2 , A.telephonenumber FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON B.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) AA ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC
SELECT LUNARUSE FROM TBL_LUNARUSE WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PREVIOSLYREGIUSE FROM TBL_PREVIOSLYREGI WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT SECRETARYID , SECRETARYNAME FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ORDER BY SECRETARYNAME

SELECT USERID AS SECRETARYID, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN USERNAME WHEN '2' THEN USERNAME2 END SECRETARYNAME FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE SECRETARYID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT DEPARTMENTCN AS DEPTID, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN DEPARTMENTNAME WHEN '2' THEN DEPARTMENTNAME2 END DEPTNAME FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_PUBLIC_DEPT WHERE USERCN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, case #v_LANG# when '1' then U.DESCRIPTION when '2' then U.DESCRIPTION2 end title FROM TBL_USERMASTER U WHERE U.CN = #v_CN# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# UNION ALL select deptid, case #v_LANG# when '1' then b.displayname when '2' then b.displayname2 end title from tbl_addjobmaster a join tbl_deptmaster b on a.deptid = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.cn = #v_CN# and a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(ATTENDANTID) FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE ATTENDANTID = #v_USERID# AND ( STATUS = 0 OR STATUS = 3 ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(A.GROUPID) FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP A JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER B ON A.GROUPID = B.GROUPID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE MEMBERID = #v_USERID# AND ( STATUS = 0 OR STATUS = 3 ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT ATTENDANTID, ATTENDANTNAME, ATTENDANTNAME2, ATTENDANTDEPTNAME, ATTENDANTDEPTNAME2, STATUS, (RESPONSEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS RESPONSEDATE FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY ATTENDANTNAME
SELECT ATTACHID, FILESIZE, FILENAME, FILEPATH FROM TBL_SCHEDULEATTACH WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

select.isEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE (USECOMPANY = 'ALL' OR USECOMPANY = #v_USERCOMPANY#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ISUSE = 1

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE (USECOMPANY = 'ALL' OR USECOMPANY = #v_USERCOMPANY#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ISUSE = 1 AND ISREST = 1

SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE (USECOMPANY = 'ALL' OR USECOMPANY = #v_USERCOMPANY#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE USECOMPANY = 'ALL' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TO_CHAR(HOLIDAYDATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'), ISSOLAR desc, SUBSTR(HOLIDAYREPEAT, 6)
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TO_CHAR(HOLIDAYDATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'), ISSOLAR desc, SUBSTR(HOLIDAYREPEAT, 6)

sqlMap.select: SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYDATE, HOLIDAYREPEAT, NVL(ISSOLAR, '0') ISSOLAR, NVL(ISREPEAT, '0') ISREPEAT, NVL(ISUSE, '0') ISUSE, NVL(ISREST, '0') ISREST, USECOMPANY FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE USECOMPANY = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (TO_CHAR(HOLIDAYDATE,'YYYY') = #holidayYear# OR ISREPEAT = 1 OR HOLIDAYREPEAT LIKE #holidayYear# || '%') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(HOLIDAYDATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'), ISSOLAR desc, SUBSTR(HOLIDAYREPEAT, 6)
SELECT SEQ_TBL_SCHEDULE.CURRVAL FROM dual
SELECT count(1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT TO_CHAR((STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STARTDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT B.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, A.STATUS AS STATUS, (A.RESPONSEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS RESPONSEDATE, B.CREATORID AS CREATORID, B.CREATORNAME AS CREATORNAME, B.CREATORNAME2 AS CREATORNAME2, B.TITLE AS TITLE, B.LOCATION AS LOCATION, B.DATETYPE AS DATETYPE, (B.STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS STARTDATE, (B.ENDDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS ENDDATE, b.repetition as repetition, showtop FROM TBL_ATTENDANT A JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE B ON A.SCHEDULEID = B.SCHEDULEID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.ATTENDANTID = #v_USERID# AND ( A.STATUS = 0 OR A.STATUS = 3 ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY A.RESPONSEDATE DESC

SELECT A.GROUPID AS GROUPID, GROUPNAME, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, (RESPONSEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS RESPONSEDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP A JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER B ON A.GROUPID = B.GROUPID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE MemberID = #v_USERID# AND (STATUS = 0 OR STATUS = 3) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY GROUPNAME
select ownerid, num, companyid, reflag from tbl_rs_schedule where scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
select creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2 from tbl_schedulegroup where groupId = #v_GROUPID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE( SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, TENANT_ID, companyid, showtop ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL, 0, #v_OWNERID#, #v_OWNERNAME#, #v_OWNERNAME2#, #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #v_SCHEDULETYPE#, #v_IMPORTANCE#, #v_HASATTENDANT#, #v_HASATTACH#, 'N', 'N', #v_ISPUBLIC#, #v_DATETYPE#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), NVL(#v_REPETITION#, ' '), ' ', #v_TITLE#, NVL(#v_LOCATION#, ' '), #v_CONTENTPATH#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_SHOWTOP# )

INSERT INTO TBL_ATTENDANT( SCHEDULEID, ATTENDANTID, ATTENDANTNAME, ATTENDANTNAME2, ATTENDANTDEPTNAME, ATTENDANTDEPTNAME2, STATUS, TENANT_ID, RESPONSEDATE, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, #v_ATTENDANTDEPTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTDEPTNAME2#, 0, #v_TENANTID#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #v_COMPANYID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL( REPETITIONID, SCHEDULEID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT SEQ_TBL_SCHEDULE_REPEDEL.NEXTVAL, SCHEDULEID , TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID# FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#

INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL( REPETITIONID, SCHEDULEID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT SEQ_TBL_SCHEDULE_REPEDEL.NEXTVAL, S.SCHEDULEID , D.STARTDATE, D.ENDDATE, S.TENANT_ID, S.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE S INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL D ON (S.PARENTID = D.SCHEDULEID AND S.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID) WHERE S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUPID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, MEMBERDEPTID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER SET MEMBERNAME = #v_MEMBERNAME#, MEMBERNAME2 = #v_MEMBERNAME2#, MEMBERDEPTID = #v_MEMBERDEPTID#, TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE( SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, showtop ) ( SELECT SEQ_TBL_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL, #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, CREATEDATE, MODIFIERID, MODIFIERNAME, MODIFIERNAME2, MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, 'Y', ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, #v_SHOWTOP# FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE SET MODIFIERID = #v_MODIFIERID#, MODIFIERNAME = #v_MODIFIERNAME#, MODIFIERNAME2 = #v_MODIFIERNAME2#, MODIFYDATE = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), IMPORTANCE = #v_IMPORTANCE#, HASATTACH = #v_HASATTACH#, ISPUBLIC = #v_ISPUBLIC#, DATETYPE = #v_DATETYPE#,
STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'),
ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'),
REPETITION = #v_REPETITION#,
LOCATION = #v_LOCATION#,
TITLE = #v_TITLE#, SHOWTOP = #v_SHOWTOP# WHERE (SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER SET STATUS = #v_STATUS#, RESPONSEDATE = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE SET HASATTENDANT = #v_HASATTENDANT# WHERE (SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
UPDATE TBL_ATTENDANT SET STATUS = #v_STATUS#, RESPONSEDATE = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND ATTENDANTID = #v_ATTENDANTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_scheduleconfig set defaultview = #v_DEFAULTVIEW#, startday = #v_STARTDAY#, starttime = #v_STARTTIME#, endtime = #v_ENDTIME#, autodelete = #v_AUTODELETE#, remindertime = #v_REMINDERTIME#, defaultviewcheck = #v_DEFAULTVIEWCHECKBOX# where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_scheduleconfig set InvitationMail = #v_INVITATIONMAIL#, INVITESCHEMODMAIL = #v_INVITESCHEMODMAIL#, CancellationMail = #v_CANCELLATIONMAIL#, AttendanceMail = #v_ATTENDANCEMAIL#, RejectedMail = #v_REJECTEDMAIL# where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_schedulerepetition_del where scheduleid in (select scheduleid from tbl_schedule where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER WHERE groupid = #v_GROUPID# AND memberid = #v_MEMBERID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEATTACH WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE (SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND ATTENDANTID = #v_ATTENDANTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND OWNERID = #v_ATTENDANTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule set modifierid = #v_MODIFIERID#, modifiername = #v_MODIFIERNAME#, modifiername2 = #v_MODIFIERNAME2#, modifydate = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), startdate = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), enddate = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') where (scheduleid = #v_SCHEDULEID# or parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_schedulegroup set creatorid = #v_MEMBERID#, creatorname = #v_MEMBERNAME#, creatorname2 = #v_MEMBERNAME2#, precreatorid = #v_CREATORID#, precreatorname = #v_CREATORNAME#, precreatorname2 = #v_CREATORNAME2#, transferdate = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_schedulegroupmember set memberid = #v_CREATORID#, membername = #v_CREATORNAME#, membername2 = #v_CREATORNAME2#, responsedate = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)
where groupid = #v_GROUPID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and memberid = #v_MEMBERID#

update tbl_schedulegroup set groupname = #v_GROUPNAME#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION#, groupColor = #v_GROUPCOLOR#, modifydate = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) where groupid = #v_GUID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
SELECT INVITATIONMAIL, INVITESCHEMODMAIL, CANCELLATIONMAIL, ATTENDANCEMAIL, REJECTEDMAIL FROM TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT COUNT(SCHEDULEID) FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND REPEATCOUNT = #v_REPEATCOUNT# AND ISALLREP = #v_ISALLREP# AND STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT DISTINCT ISALLREP FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID#
AND REPEATCOUNT = #v_REPEATCOUNT# AND STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE ( SCHEDULEID, REPEATCOUNT, ISALLREP, STARTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) (SELECT DISTINCT S.SCHEDULEID, #v_REPEATCOUNT#, #v_ISALLREP#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID# FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C RIGHT OUTER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE S ON (C.SCHEDULEID = NULL OR S.SCHEDULEID = C.SCHEDULEID OR S.PARENTID = C.SCHEDULEID) AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE (S.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C WHERE SCHEDULEID IN ( SELECT SCHEDULEID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE S WHERE (S.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID )
AND C.REPEATCOUNT = #v_REPEATCOUNT# AND C.ISALLREP = #v_ISALLREP# AND C.STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C WHERE SCHEDULEID IN ( SELECT SCHEDULEID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE S WHERE (S.SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID#) AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID ) AND C.ISALLREP != #v_ISALLREP# AND C.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE SC1 USING ( SELECT S.SCHEDULEID, C.REPEATCOUNT, C.ISALLREP, C.STARTDATE, C.TENANT_ID, C.COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE C INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE S ON S.PARENTID = C.SCHEDULEID AND S.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND S.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID WHERE S.PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) SC2 ON ( SC1.SCHEDULEID = SC2.SCHEDULEID AND SC1.REPEATCOUNT = SC2.REPEATCOUNT AND SC1.ISALLREP = SC2.ISALLREP AND SC1.STARTDATE = SC2.STARTDATE ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SCHEDULEID, REPEATCOUNT, ISALLREP, STARTDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( SC2.SCHEDULEID, SC2.REPEATCOUNT, SC2.ISALLREP, SC2.STARTDATE, SC2.TENANT_ID, SC2.COMPANYID )
sqlMap.select: select GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where companyid = #companyID# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and userid = #id#
select * from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where userid = #v_USERID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule_oauthinfo ( USERID, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN, GOOGLECREATEDATE, GOOGLEUPDATEDATE, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) values ( #v_USERID#, #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN#, #v_GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN#, case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then null else TO_DATE(#v_TODAYUTCTIME#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') end, case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then null else TO_DATE(#v_TODAYUTCTIME#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') end, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule_oauthinfo set USERID = #v_USERID#, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN = #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN#, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN = #v_GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN#, GOOGLECREATEDATE = case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then GOOGLECREATEDATE else case GOOGLECREATEDATE when null then TO_DATE(#v_TODAYUTCTIME#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') else GOOGLECREATEDATE end end, GOOGLEUPDATEDATE = case when #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN# is null then null else case GOOGLEUPDATEDATE when null then TO_DATE(#v_TODAYUTCTIME#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') else GOOGLEUPDATEDATE end end where userid = #v_USERID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: select USERID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN IS NOT NULL and GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN IS NOT NULL

select USERID, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN, GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN from tbl_schedule_oauthinfo where GOOGLEUPDATEDATE + (INTERVAL '50' MINUTE) < #v_TODAYUTCTIME# and GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN IS NOT NULL and GOOGLEREFRESHTOKEN IS NOT NULL
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedule_oauthinfo set GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN = #v_GOOGLEACCESSTOKEN#, GOOGLEUPDATEDATE = #v_TODAYUTCTIME# where userid = #v_USERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT C.* FROM ( SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, A.CREATORID, A.CREATORNAME, A.CREATORNAME2, (A.CREATEDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS CREATEDATE, A.MODIFIERID, A.MODIFIERNAME, A.MODIFIERNAME2, (A.MODIFYDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS MODIFYDATE, SCHEDULETYPE, IMPORTANCE, HASATTENDANT, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, ISREADONLY, ISPUBLIC, DATETYPE, (A.STARTDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS STARTDATE, (A.ENDDATE + #v_OFFSETMIN#/(24*60)) AS ENDDATE, REPETITION, REPETITIONDELETE, TITLE, LOCATION, CONTENTPATH, B.GROUPNAME, A.COMPANYID, CASE WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 1 THEN 'rgb(1, 138, 249)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 2 THEN 'rgb(1, 179, 63)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 3 THEN 'rgb(254, 28, 113)' WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 7 THEN B.GROUPCOLOR WHEN SCHEDULETYPE = 10 THEN 'rgb(255, 174, 0)' ELSE 'rgb(233, 222, 19)' END AS GROUPCOLOR, SHOWTOP FROM TBL_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP B ON A.OWNERID = B.GROUPID WHERE (A.OWNERID IN
#v_INDILIST[]#
AND a.scheduletype <> '10' AND ispublic = #v_ISPUBLIIC# AND ( (A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.DATETYPE='3') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
and A.title like '%'|| #v_SEARCHTITLE# ||'%' ESCAPE ESCAPE '\'
) or (A.OWNERID IN
#v_PIDLIST[]#
and A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# and ((A.scheduletype = '2' and A.ownerid in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN = #v_USERID# UNION ALL SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# UNION ALL SELECT UNISTR(DEPARTMENTCN) FROM tbl_schedule_public_dept WHERE USERCN = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )) or (A.scheduletype <> '2')) AND ( (A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.DATETYPE='3') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
and A.title like '%'|| #v_SEARCHTITLE# ||'%' ESCAPE ESCAPE '\'
) OR (a.scheduletype = '10' AND a.ownerid IN (
SELECT cn FROM tbl_executive WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT USERID FROM tbl_secretary WHERE (SECRETARYID = #v_USERID# or USERID = #v_USERID#) AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
)
AND ( (A.STARTDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.STARTDATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.DATETYPE='3') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
and A.title like '%'|| #v_SEARCHTITLE# ||'%' ESCAPE ESCAPE '\'
) ) C ORDER BY C.STARTDATE ASC

SELECT STATUS FROM TBL_ATTENDANT WHERE SCHEDULEID = (SELECT CASE WHEN PARENTID = '0' THEN SCHEDULEID ELSE PARENTID END AS SCHEDULEID FROM ( SELECT SCHEDULEID, PARENTID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# ) A ) AND ATTENDANTID = #v_ATTENDANTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_schedule_reminder_scheduler( scheduleid, ownerid, ownername, ownername2, creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, scheduletype, datetype, startdate, enddate, repetition, title, tenant_id, companyid, reminderstatus, offsetinfo, lang, OFFSETMIN, parentid ) values ( #v_SCHEDULEID#, #v_OWNERID#, #v_OWNERNAME#, #v_OWNERNAME2#, #v_CREATORID#, #v_CREATORNAME#, #v_CREATORNAME2#, #v_SCHEDULETYPE#, #v_DATETYPE#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), nvl(#v_REPETITION#, ''), #v_TITLE#, #v_TENANTID#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_REMINDERSTATUS#, #v_OFFSET#, #v_LANG#, #v_OFFSETMIN#, 0 )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),
DATETYPE = #v_DATETYPE#,
REPETITION = NVL(#v_REPETITION#, ''),
TITLE = #v_TITLE#,
REMINDERSTATUS = #v_REMINDERSTATUS# WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TSRS.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSRS.OWNERID AS OWNERID, TSRS.OWNERNAME AS OWNERNAME, TSRS.OWNERNAME2 AS OWNERNAME2, TSRS.CREATORID AS CREATORID, TSRS.CREATORNAME AS CREATORNAME, TSRS.CREATORNAME2 AS CREATORNAME2, TSRS.STARTDATE - (TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60)) + (TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60)) AS REMINDSTARTDATE, TSRS.STARTDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24*60) AS STARTDATE, TSRS.ENDDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24*60) AS ENDDATE, TSRS.TITLE AS TITLE, TSRS.DATETYPE AS DATETYPE, TSRS.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID, TSRS.OFFSETMIN AS OFFSETMIN, TSRS.OFFSETINFO AS OFFSETINFO, TSRS.LANG AS LANG, 0 AS REPEATCOUNT, TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE AS SCHEDULETYPE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24*60), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TODAYDATE, TSRS.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TSRS.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != 0 AND TSRS.DATETYPE != '3' AND TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE = '1' AND TSC.SCHEDULEID IS NULL AND TSRS.REMINDERSTATUS = '0' AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TSRS.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TSRS.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #cronMinute# / (24 * 60)

SELECT TSRS.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSRS.OWNERID AS OWNERID, TSRS.OWNERNAME AS OWNERNAME, TSRS.OWNERNAME2 AS OWNERNAME2, TSRS.CREATORID AS CREATORID, TSRS.CREATORNAME AS CREATORNAME, TSRS.CREATORNAME2 AS CREATORNAME2, TSRS.STARTDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60) AS STARTDATE, TSRS.ENDDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60) AS ENDDATE, TSRS.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60) AS REMINDSTARTDATE, TSRS.REPETITION AS REPETITION, TSRS.TITLE AS TITLE, TSRS.DATETYPE AS DATETYPE, TSRS.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID, TSRS.OFFSETMIN AS OFFSETMIN, TSRS.OFFSETINFO AS OFFSETINFO, TSRS.LANG AS LANG, TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE AS SCHEDULETYPE, TSRS.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TSRS.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != 0 AND TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE ='1' AND TSRS.REMINDERSTATUS = '0' AND (TSC.SCHEDULEID IS NULL OR TSC.ISALLREP != 'Y') AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TO_CHAR(TSRS.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60), 'HH24:MI') >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60), 'HH24:MI') AND TO_CHAR(TSRS.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60), 'HH24:MI') < TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #cronMinute# / (24 * 60) + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60), 'HH24:MI') AND CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') - 1, 1) != '0' AND TSRS.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #cronMinute# / (24 * 60) THEN 1 WHEN SUBSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') - 1, 1) = '0' AND TSRS.ENDDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1

SELECT TSD.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSD.STARTDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60) AS STARTDATE, TSD.ENDDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24*60) AS ENDDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEREPETITION_DEL TSD INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSD.SCHEDULEID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != '0' AND TSD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TSD.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TSD.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #cronMinute# / (24 * 60)

SELECT TSC.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSC.STARTDATE + TSRS.OFFSETMIN / (24 * 60) AS STARTDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != '0' AND TSC.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TSC.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TSC.STARTDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #cronMinute# / (24 * 60)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER SET REMINDERSTATUS = #v_REMINDERSTATUS# WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# OR PARENTID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE SCHEDULEID = #v_SCHEDULEID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER( SCHEDULEID, OWNERID, OWNERNAME, OWNERNAME2, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, SCHEDULETYPE, DATETYPE, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, REPETITION, TITLE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, REMINDERSTATUS, OFFSETINFO, LANG, OFFSETMIN, PARENTID ) VALUES ( #scheInfo.scheduleId#, #v_ATTENDANTID#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME#, #v_ATTENDANTNAME2#, #scheInfo.creatorId#, #scheInfo.creatorName#, #scheInfo.creatorName2#, #scheInfo.scheduleType#, #scheInfo.dateType#, TO_DATE(#v_STARTDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_ENDDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #scheInfo.repetition#, #scheInfo.title#, #v_TENANTID#, #scheInfo.companyid#, #v_REMINDERSTATUS#, #v_OFFSET#, #v_LANG#, #v_OFFSETMIN#, #scheInfo.parentId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUPNAME, DESCRIPTION, CREATEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGROUP WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedule_reminder_scheduler where parentid = #v_SCHEDULEID# and ownerid = #v_ATTENDANTID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TSRS.SCHEDULEID AS SCHEDULEID, TSRS.OWNERID AS OWNERID, TSRS.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER TSRS LEFT JOIN TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE TSC ON TSRS.SCHEDULEID = TSC.SCHEDULEID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TSRS.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULECONFIG TSCF ON TSRS.OWNERID = TSCF.USERID AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = TSCF.TENANT_ID WHERE TSCF.REMINDERTIME != 0 AND TSRS.DATETYPE = '3' AND TSRS.SCHEDULETYPE ='1' AND TSRS.REMINDERSTATUS = '0' AND (TSC.SCHEDULEID IS NULL OR TSC.ISALLREP != 'Y') AND TSRS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( (SUBSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') - 1, 1) = '0' AND TSRS.ENDDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (SUBSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, INSTR(TSRS.REPETITION, '|') - 1, 1) = '0' AND TSRS.ENDDATE - TSCF.REMINDERTIME / (24 * 60) = TO_DATE(#nowTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGROUPMEMBER SET WRITEPERMISSION = #v_WRITEPERMISSION# WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: select case when executive > 0 and secreatry > 0 then 'a' when executive > 0 then 'u' when secreatry > 0 then 's' else 'none' end as result from ( select ( select COUNT(*) from tbl_executive where cn = #v_USERID# and COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) as executive, ( select COUNT(*) from tbl_secretary where SECRETARYID = #v_USERID# and COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# and TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) as secreatry FROM dual )
SELECT usage FROM tbl_executive WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND CN = #v_USERID#
SELECT GROUPID, GROUPNAME, DESCRIPTION, CREATEDATE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER WHERE CREATORID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# ORDER BY GROUPNAME

SELECT COUNT(U.MEMBERID) FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, NVL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND U.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT U.MEMBERID, U.DISPLAYNAME MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 MEMBERNAME2, U.MAIL, G.GROUPNAME AS STATUS, '' RESPONSEDATE, U.DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME || '(' || D.DISPLAYNAME || ')' WHEN '2' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME2 || '(' || D.DISPLAYNAME2 || ')' END INFO FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, NVL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND U.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

DELETE FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT U.MEMBERID, G.GROUPNAME, G.DESCRIPTION, U.DISPLAYNAME MEMBERNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2 MEMBERNAME2, '' as STATUS, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60) as responsedate, U.MAIL AS MAIL, U.DEPARTMENT FROM (SELECT A.GROUPID, A.MEMBERID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2, NVL(A.MEMBERDEPTID, B.DEPARTMENT) DEPARTMENT, B.MAIL, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.MEMBERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) U INNER JOIN TBL_SCHEDULEGATHER G ON U.GROUPID = G.GROUPID AND U.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID WHERE U.GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_schedulegather set groupname = #v_GROUPNAME#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION# where groupid = #v_GUID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT GROUPID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, MEMBERDEPTID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SCHEDULEGATHERMEMBER SET MEMBERNAME = #v_MEMBERNAME#, MEMBERNAME2 = #v_MEMBERNAME2#, MEMBERDEPTID = #v_MEMBERDEPTID#, TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# WHERE GROUPID = #v_GROUPID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2 FROM TBL_SECRETARY WHERE SECRETARYID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT DEPARTMENTCN AS DEPTID, DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPTNAME, DEPARTMENTNAME2 AS DEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_PUBLIC_DEPT WHERE USERCN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, U.DESCRIPTION AS deptName, U.DESCRIPTION2 AS deptName2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER U WHERE U.CN = #userID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT DEPTID, B.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPTNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DEPTNAME2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_scheduleconfig SET DEFAULTVIEW= #status# WHERE USERID= #userId# AND tenant_id= #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERID, SCHEDULETYPE, RELATEDID, TAGCOLOR, ISCHECKED, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG WHERE USERID = #userID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: MERGE INTO TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG config USING (SELECT #userID# AS USERID, #scheduleType# AS SCHEDULETYPE, #relatedID# AS RELATEDID, #isChecked# AS ISCHECKED, #tenantID# AS TENANT_ID, #companyID# AS COMPANYID FROM DUAL )new ON ( config.USERID = new.USERID AND config.SCHEDULETYPE = new.SCHEDULETYPE AND config.RELATEDID = new.RELATEDID AND config.TENANT_ID = new.TENANT_ID AND config.COMPANYID = new.COMPANYID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET config.ISCHECKED = new.ISCHECKED WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USERID, SCHEDULETYPE, RELATEDID, ISCHECKED, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (new.USERID, new.SCHEDULETYPE, new.RELATEDID, new.ISCHECKED, new.TENANT_ID, new.COMPANYID)

MERGE INTO TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG config USING (SELECT #userId# AS USERID, #scheduleType# AS SCHEDULETYPE, #relatedId# AS RELATEDID, #tagColor# AS TAGCOLOR, #tenantId# AS TENANT_ID, #companyId# AS COMPANYID FROM DUAL )new ON ( config.USERID = new.USERID AND config.SCHEDULETYPE = new.SCHEDULETYPE AND config.RELATEDID = new.RELATEDID AND config.TENANT_ID = new.TENANT_ID AND config.COMPANYID = new.COMPANYID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET config.TAGCOLOR = new.TAGCOLOR WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USERID, SCHEDULETYPE, RELATEDID, TAGCOLOR, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (new.USERID, new.SCHEDULETYPE, new.RELATEDID, new.TAGCOLOR, new.TENANT_ID, new.COMPANYID)
sqlMap.select: SELECT TAGCOLOR FROM TBL_USER_SCHEDULE_TYPE_CONFIG WHERE USERID = #userID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND SCHEDULETYPE = #scheduleType# AND RELATEDID = #relatedId#
